binding_inputs.wavefunction: Psi_nl(r,theta_pol,phi_az,chi) = R_nl(r) * Y_l^0(theta_pol) * delta(chi - theta(r) mod L_chi)

steps.title: 5D Hamiltonian decomposition

symbolic_form.Delta_E_nl_integral: -hbar^2/(2*m_e) * integral_d4x integral_0^L_chi dchi conj(Psi_nl) * d^2 Psi_nl / dchi^2

steps.output_for_next_step: H_chi operator and integral expression (1.3); Step 2 will Fourier-expand delta(chi - theta(r) mod L_chi) on the chi-circle so the second derivative acts on smooth modes (Path-B from P1-T2 sec 3.5).

pending_directive.directive_text: State r↔χ coupling explicitly in plain prose at top of Step 2 before any calculation; then evaluate projection integral, identify Jacobian, name the physical length scale R_χ, and produce a single dimensionally-consistent finite expression for ΔE_nℓ

issues.description: Dimensional inconsistency — the δ-function on χ has dimensions 1/length but the integral measure dχ expects a dimensionless integrand. Step 2 must either regularize δ→Fourier-mode sum (Path-B from P1-T2 §3.5) or prove the dimensions cancel before proceeding.
The Jacobian dθ/dr = 1/(αr) was stated but never derived from the embedding map. Step 2 must derive it explicitly from F4's log-spiral forward map and confirm it matches.
Name and define R_χ = L_χ/(2π) = 1/α as the compactification radius. All subsequent expressions should use R_χ so dimensional analysis is transparent.
